implementation_blocked_reason: All pre-implementation gates satisfied: T01 (Morpheus spec review ✅), T02 (ADR-M5-01 + ADR-M5-02 ✅), T03 (Trinity security review + ADR-M5-03 ✅). Implementation streams T04-T17 are unblocked. T18, T19, T20 unblock on T17 completion.

amendments.summary: Terminology clarification (Agentic Layer vs AKS Agent Gateway); E2E tracing requirements (mock + AKS, OTEL/Jaeger, FR-11, FR-12, NFR-07); tasks T17–T20 added (tracing design, OTEL instrumentation, Compose overlay, tracing security review); roadmap milestone outcomes updated.

ADR-M5-01.question: AKS optional track vs ACA default track

ADR-M5-02.question: Agent ID sidecar mock boundary vs real SDK / direct MSAL
ADR-M5-02.decision: Option A — in-process AgentSidecarClient ABC with MockAgentSidecarClient

ADR-M5-03.question: JWKS client library and key-rotation / caching strategy
ADR-M5-03.decision: Option A — PyJWT + manual httpx JWKS fetch, in-process TTL dict (300s, configurable), kid-keyed cache, one kid-miss retry, algorithm normalization to lowercase

notes: Promoted from draft/research-only to tasks-ready on 2026-05-14 by spec-feature agent.
All spec artifacts are complete. Implementation is blocked pending T03 (security review).
No implementation files (runtime/infra code) were modified during spec promotion.
Existing identity-notes.md and infra-notes.md are preserved; their research content is integrated into research.md and design.md.
Spec-first gate is now satisfied. Coordinator should schedule T01 (Morpheus review) to unblock the review stream.

T19 COMPLETE 2026-05-28 — Tank. Created docker/docker-compose.tracing.yml (otel-collector otel/opentelemetry-collector-contrib:0.104.0 + jaeger jaegertracing/all-in-one:1.58; images pinned; ILLUSTRATIVE comment present; OTEL env vars added to bff/agent-gateway/mcp-protected-api; network merge via compose -f). Created docker/otel-collector-config.yaml (OTLP gRPC+HTTP → otlp/jaeger exporter to jaeger:4317). docker/README.md updated with opt-in tracing usage section. Validation: docker compose config --quiet exit 0. T20 now blocked only on T18.
Amendment 001 applied 2026-05-15: terminology clarification, E2E tracing requirements (FR-11, FR-12, NFR-07), tasks T17–T20.
Amendment 001 approved by Ashley Hollis after Morpheus architecture review and Spec Feature terminology reconciliation. Implementation remains blocked pending T03.

Amendment 001 terminology correction applied 2026-05-15: 'local app gateway' superseded by 'Agentic Layer' and 'standalone Agent Gateway' superseded by 'AKS Agent Gateway' per ADR 0006 (accepted by Morpheus). Artifact paths apps/agent-gateway/ and Docker Compose service name agent-gateway preserved as legacy references.

T17 COMPLETE 2026-05-27 — Morpheus tracing design review. Verdict: AMENDED → ACCEPTED. Four corrections applied to design.md §End-to-End Tracing Design: (1) T19 implementer note for Docker network config; (2) span names to dot-separated convention, agentic-layer.obo.exchange replacing agent_obo.exchange; (3) Required Span Attributes table converted to identity_lab.* namespace per T03 §9 (identity_lab.auth_mode, identity_lab.aud, identity_lab.authorized, identity_lab.obo_hop, identity_lab.fixture_name); (4) PII error removed — jwt.sub CEL example replaced with request.path/request.method plus prohibition note. service.name for lab Agentic Layer set to agent-gateway (Compose service name). T18 (Neo) and T19 (Tank) are now ready.

T04 COMPLETE 2026-05-10 — Tank created AKS Terraform module skeletons: modules/aks, modules/workload-identity, modules/k8s-bootstrap, environments/aks. All placeholder-only (no real IDs/secrets). terraform fmt -check -recursive, init -backend=false, and validate all pass. T05 now unblocked.

T05 COMPLETE 2026-05-27 — Tank created docs/deployment/k8s/ with README.md, namespace.yaml, service-account.yaml, agent-gateway-deployment.yaml, network-policy.yaml. All files labelled ILLUSTRATIVE REFERENCE ONLY. Agentic Layer terminology used throughout; all GUIDs are all-zero placeholders; no real IDs/secrets. YAML syntax validated. T14 dependency on T05 satisfied; T14 remains blocked on T12+T13+T18+T19.

T06 COMPLETE 2026-05-15 — Trinity. Added xms_act_fct to config/claims/safe-claims-allowlist.json and DEFAULT_SAFE_CLAIM_KEYS in claims.py. Extended _sanitize_value() to handle dict inputs safely (recursive scalar sanitization, 512-char JSON bound, nested-dict safe). New test file tests/security/test_t06_actor_claims.py covers: xms_act_fct inclusion, oid/sub suppression, dict handling without raise, sanitize_claims integration. T07 now unblocked.

T07 COMPLETE 2026-05-28 — Trinity. Created seven Agent ID / Agent OBO fixture JSON files under tests/fixtures/sample-claims/: agent-blueprint-user-token, agent-obo-mcp-token, agent-wrong-audience, agent-missing-actor, agent-app-only-blueprint, agent-untrusted-tenant, agent-replay-stale. All all-zero placeholder GUIDs. No PII claims (no oid/sub/email/upn/name). xms_act_fct in obo-mcp-token is JSON object {appid: 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000201}. exp=1893456000 for valid fixtures; exp=1600000000 for stale fixture. Validation: python -m pytest tests/security/test_t06_actor_claims.py tests/security/test_jwks_strict.py -> 49 passed. T08 and T11 now unblocked.

T09 COMPLETE 2026-05-15 — Trinity. Created apps/shared/python/identity_lab_auth/jwks.py implementing: ALLOWED_ALGORITHMS, REJECTED_ALGORITHMS, _validate_algorithm() with lowercase normalization (closes mixed-case bypass), JwksCache dataclass with TTL/kid-miss-retry/injectable http client, validate_strict() with jku/x5u suppression. New test file tests/security/test_jwks_strict.py covers: alg:none (all mixed-case variants), HS256/HS384/HS512, missing kid, unknown kid after retry, jku/x5u SSRF suppression, fixture-header suppression in strict mode, RS256+kid structure accepted. All 140 tests pass.
